lane: Human Final Video Review Decision Apply
project: AI Video Production Workspace Three Route Plan
title: Human Final Video Review Decision Apply
scope: read the Jenn-filled R3-9P final video review table
parse exactly one human final-video decision: accept, reject, or revision_requested
apply the final video review decision to local project state
record final creative approval only if the human decision is accept
write a final video review decision apply report
do not publish, deploy, upload, call providers, regenerate, reassemble, read env files or credentials, overwrite source assets, or push
goal: Apply Jenn's completed final video review decision and, if accepted, mark the local final video as creatively approved for closeout.
acceptance: R3-9P final video review table is parsed as the source of truth.
Exactly one final video decision row is parsed.
Exactly one decision is selected among accept, reject, and revision_requested.
If decision is accept, the final video artifact artifact_2fa09a9e-3408-49f8-96f9-42c87cfbbfbe is recorded as final creatively approved in local state/report.
If decision is reject or revision_requested, final creative approval remains false and the report routes to a revision strategy task instead of closeout.
Report includes reviewer, note, final video path, final video artifact id, source clip artifacts, ffprobe status, and decision summary.

Report records publish_performed=false, release_or_deploy_performed=false, network_call_attempted=false, runninghub_called=false, runway_called=false, provider_credits_consumed=false, regeneration_performed=false, final_video_reassembled=false, env_files_read=false, credentials_read=false, source_assets_overwritten=false, secret_values_exposed=false.
validation: R3-9P final video review table parse / required decision check
JSON parse for generated R3-9Q decision apply report
claimed_by: Codex R3-9Q final video review decision apply

safe_actions_completed: Parsed the Jenn-filled R3-9P final video review table.

If R3-9Q records reject or revision_requested, prepare a final video revision strategy instead of delivery closeout.
